summary: Verified admin session persistence fix and scope popover search fix. All tests PASSED: 1) Login stores token/user/auth_last_verified in localStorage, 2) Session persists after page refresh, 3) /auth/me and /auth/refresh-token endpoints work correctly, 4) Scope popover search input is clickable and typeable inside Bulk Category Editor modal.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error (unrelated to auth fix, pre-existing issue from iteration_92)

critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.js correctly implements: 1) localStorage persistence for token, user, and auth_last_verified, 2) 30-minute VERIFY_INTERVAL to reduce unnecessary /auth/me calls, 3) Global axios 401 interceptor with auto-refresh, 4) Ref-based token access to avoid stale closures

BulkCategoryEditorSections.jsx correctly implements capture-phase focusin/focusout interceptors (lines 54-72) to bypass Radix FocusScope focus trapping, allowing search input to be focused and typed in

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI tests passed (login, session persistence, scope popover search)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin session persistence fix VERIFIED: 1) AuthContext.js stores auth_last_verified timestamp in localStorage, 2) On page refresh within 30 minutes, cached user data is used without /auth/me call, 3) Global axios interceptor handles 401 responses with auto-refresh. Scope popover search fix VERIFIED: capture-phase focus event interceptors allow typing in search input inside Radix Dialog modal.

1_admin_login_flow.details: Login with qasim@tilestation.co.uk / admin123 stores token, user, and auth_last_verified in localStorage

2_session_persistence.details: After page refresh, user remains logged in at /admin (not redirected to /admin/login)

3_auth_me_endpoint.details: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token

4_refresh_token_endpoint.details: POST /api/auth/refresh-token returns new token and user data

5_protected_route_access.details: /admin/supplier-products loads correctly after login and page refresh

6_scope_popover_search.details: Search input inside Bulk Category Editor scope popover is clickable and typeable - typed 'test' successfully

fix_verification.fix_1_description: Admin sessions expire too frequently, forcing re-logins
fix_verification.fix_1_location: AuthContext.js - Complete rewrite with persisted lastVerified timestamp, global axios interceptor, ref-based token access
fix_verification.fix_1_result: FIXED - Session persists after page refresh, auth_last_verified stored in localStorage, 30-minute cache window reduces API calls
fix_verification.fix_2_description: Scope popover search input not clickable/typeable inside Radix Dialog modal
fix_verification.fix_2_location: BulkCategoryEditorSections.jsx lines 54-72 - capture-phase focusin/focusout event interceptors
fix_verification.fix_2_result: FIXED - Search input is now focusable and accepts keyboard input
